THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOH, BANG HWAN KOH, SANG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RESTORED $2,569.46 RENT, $270.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $232.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,071.46, LEASE FORFEITED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WRIGHT, THOMAS PAUL SUBSTITUTED FOR MARGULIES, JEFFREY EVAN AS ATTORNEY FOR PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOH, BANG HWAN KOH, SANG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 125 CAMBON DRIVE #6-D, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522
